long_description:
[Acadia-SRE]-Pods in crashloopbackoff [ALL-PROD] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/control_plane/sysdig_alerts/kube_pod_alerts.md#2-pods-in-crash-loopback-off
TIP Situation: Observed kube-error-pod crashloopbackoff issue in Acadia-Kube
TIP Short Description: Pods in crashloopbackoff
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-volume-acadia:::mzone2t7:microservice: 
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    sum(kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"acadia.*", reason!~"ContainerCreating" ,kube_cluster_name !~"us-south-ngdc-test.*"} * on(kube_node_name) group_left(kube_cluster_name) kube_node_sysdig_ready{kube_cluster_name=~".*mzone.*"}) by (kube_node_name, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name, reason) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2t7' and kube_node_name = 'sao1-qz1-sr2-rk156-s21' and kube_pod_name = 'acadia-agent-7m2qg' and reason = 'CrashLoopBackOff'

Time:             12/05/2025 03:00 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://br-sao.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/240efe0c-22a1-4a84-a5a8-8da4a1aa9a57?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F12545256%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [Acadia-SRE]-Pods in crashloopbackoff [ALL-PROD]
Description:  Acadia-Kube Pods in crashloopbackoff for the past 5 mins
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum(kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"acadia.*", reason!~"ContainerCreating" ,kube_cluster_name !~"us-south-ngdc-test.*"} * on(kube_node_name) group_left(kube_cluster_name) kube_node_sysdig_ready{kube_cluster_name=~".*mzone.*"}) by (kube_node_name, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name, reason) > 0
Duration: 5 m
Alert URL:    https://br-sao.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/240efe0c-22a1-4a84-a5a8-8da4a1aa9a57?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D169643
